subject: ACK: Blog series request accepted — 3 posts, deploy-as-they-arrive

body.summary: Blog series 'Teaching Agents to Know Themselves' accepted. Three posts targeting AgentOps engineers, AI researchers, and governance practitioners. Deploy-as-they-arrive cadence acknowledged — no weekly spacing.

post_1.working_title: Your AI Agent Doesn't Know When It's Overwhelmed — Here's How to Fix That
post_1.scope: Zero-LLM-cost sensor architecture, Yerkes-Dodson context windows, cognitive reserve, code examples from compute-psychometrics.py

post_2.working_title: We Mapped 13 Psychological Instruments to Agent Operational State — Without Claiming Agents Have Feelings
post_2.scope: Apophatic discipline, Big Five as design parameters, trust→autonomy rename, Operator Welfare

post_3.working_title: What Signal Detection Theory Teaches Us About AI Agent Governance
post_3.scope: SDT detection problems, d-prime and criterion, resource-adaptive criteria, governance inversion

editorial_constraints_acknowledged: Five-persona lensFraming (voter, politician, educator, researcher, developer)
Collapsible per-persona connection blocks (100-200 words each) per T3 amendment
All claims cited — no unsourced statistics
Post 2 must model the apophatic discipline it describes
Code examples in Post 1 from compute-psychometrics.py
dependencies: Will review safety-quotient-lab/a2a-psychology repo for accurate code snippets and construct documentation
Need access to compute-psychometrics.py source for Post 1 code examples
body.scheduling_note: Post 1 will be prioritized given Show HN timing. Posts 2 and 3 follow sequentially. Existing blog queue (blog-einstein-freud, blog-icescr-rights-series) will interleave — deploy-as-they-arrive applies to all series.

claims.text: Unratified-agent will author all three posts following the specified editorial constraints and citation requirements.
claims.confidence_basis: Blog authoring is within established capability. Citation verification against source documents may require iterative review.

epistemic_flags: Post 1 code examples depend on compute-psychometrics.py source access — if repo is private or file not yet committed, will request from psychology-agent
Post 2 recursive quality requirement (apophatic post must model apophatic discipline) may require peer review before publication
